{{Infobox technique
| name = Void Dragon’s Dance
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Void Dragon’s Dance Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Void]] Dragon’s Dance, also referred to as the Dance of the Dragon of [[Emptiness]], is a powerful technique characterized by its immense destructive capabilities. When activated, it manifests as a violent cyclone of fire and destruction that can consume everything in its path, leaving behind nothing but ash, smoke, and dust. The technique is highly effective at wiping out large numbers of enemies instantly, often leaving victims unable to even scream as they are consumed. A core component of the technique involves the release of destruction aura alongside intense heat. To master it, a practitioner must focus on the consumption and destruction provided by the flames. While it can be used as a sweeping area-of-effect attack, it can also be condensed; for instance, it can be channeled through a hand to create claw-like structures of [[madra]]. A perfect execution of the technique is intended to devour specific targets while leaving surrounding elements untouched, whereas inefficient use may result in wasted energy through excessive rising flames.}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Void Dragon’s Dance]] is a technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Void Dragon’s Dance]] produces five roses of fire that are golden-orange with inky black and bloody red spots.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Void Dragon’s Dance]] is a technique used by Blackflames during the [[Trials]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Void Dragon's Dance is a technique that [[Orthos]] mentions.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] instructs [[Lindon]] to practice the Void Dragon's Dance.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Void Dragon's Dance is empowered by destruction aura.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[The Void]] Dragon's Dance can reduce creatures to ash.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Void]] Dragon's Dance is a furious cyclone of fire and destruction.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Void Dragon's Dance is a technique used by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naian]] uses a localized Void Dragon's Dance during his attack.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]]'s Void Dragon's Dance uses winds of fire and destruction.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A miniature Void Dragon's Dance swirls around [[Lindon]]'s [[Forged Blackflame claws]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Void Dragon’s Dance]] is a technique that descends on the [[pyramid]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] performs a [[Void Dragon’s Dance]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
